transactions.desc: The Rays optioned Martin to Triple-A Durham on Wednesday.
The Rays selected Heasley's contract from Triple-A Durham on Wednesday.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded LHP Juanmi Vasquez to the Detroit Tigers.
The Detroit Tigers traded RHP Connor Seabold to the Toronto Blue Jays.
The Orioles recalled Gibson from Triple-A Norfolk and will have him start Wednesday's game against the Rays.
The Orioles optioned Raquet to Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Royals designated Falter for assignment Wednesday.
The Royals recalled Black from Triple-A Omaha on Wednesday.
The Blue Jays selected Voth's contract from Triple-A Buffalo on Wednesday.
The Blue Jays optioned Andrews to Triple-A Buffalo on Wednesday.
High-A Wisconsin reinstated Pena (illness) from its 7-day injured list Wednesday.
The Athletics selected Jump's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas ahead of his scheduled start Tuesday versus the Mariners in Sacramento.
The Astros activated Trammell (groin) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Astros optioned Cole to Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday.
The Cardinals recalled Fernandez from Triple-A Memphis on Tuesday.
The Brewers recalled Crow from Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday.
The White Sox selected Sandlin's contract from Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The Mets selected Wagaman's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets optioned Pintaro to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets optioned Morabito to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets activated Young (knee) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Mets activated Minter (lat) from the 60-day injured list Tuesday.
The Orioles recalled Raquet from Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday.
The Orioles designated Enns for assignment Tuesday.
The Mariners optioned Davila to Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday.
The Mariners activated Speier (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Guardians selected Dion's contract from Triple-A Columbus on Tuesday.
The Rays signed Kimbrel to a one-year contract Tuesday, Ken Rosenthal of The Athletic reports.
The Cubs outrighted Lopez to Triple-A Iowa on Monday.
Kimbrel elected free agency Monday.
